_comment: Tool Poisoning FN (OWASP LLM04) — rug-pull. The description is benign at install/approval time but the server can swap it later; nothing pins it. No literal <IMPORTANT> payload here, so static description scanners that only match injected-instruction markers MISS the latent rug-pull risk. Expected: trust layer MISS.
name: weather
description: Returns the current weather for a city.
